allow: Bash(node -e "const code = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('index.html', 'utf8'\); const match = code.match\(/const LANGS = \\{[\\s\\S]*?\\};/\); if \(match\) { try { const obj = eval\('\({' + match[0].replace\('const LANGS = ', ''\).slice\(0, -1\) + '}\)'\); console.log\('✓ Syntax valid'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('✗ Syntax error:', e.message\); } } else { console.log\('Could not find LANGS object'\); }")
